title: DIY Terrarium Kit with Ficus Bonsai, Fittonia & Fern, 25cm Complete Glass Container Set with LED Cork Lid, High Quality Closed Terrarium, Ecosystem, Garden in Bottle, Office Home Decoration

features: SIZE: H: 25 cm | D: 19 cm - ideal decorative piece for any space.

OPTIONAL LED CORK LID: Add a decorative LED light to your terrarium for a stunning nighttime display. (please note, it’s for decorative purposes only and not a grow light). It requires 3 AAA batteries (not included).
THREE LIVE PLANTS AND MOSS: Features Ficus Bonsai, Fittonia, and a lush Fern for a diverse and vibrant look.
EASY TO MAKE: Step-by-step instructions are included, making this kit perfect for beginners and plant enthusiasts, providing a fun hands-on project.
DIY YOUR UNIQUE ECOSYSTEM : This terrarium kit allows you to create your own miniature garden, offering both aesthetic beauty and a rewarding DIY gardening experience.
description: From the brand DIY Terrarium Kits Each kit includes everything you need to build your terrarium, carefully prepared in our London studio and shipped quickly.
